title: rubus hystrix var. trifoliolatus
intro: Rubus hystrix var. trifoliolatus, also known as Himalayan raspberry or trifoliolatus bramble, is a type of thorny shrub native to the Himalayan region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus hystrix var. trifoliolatus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of diabetes and arthritis. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its leaves, stems, and roots can be dried and used in various forms of traditional medicine.
